FIGHT: Lagavulin (111 HP, asleep, Metallicize 8). TYPE: Kill-speed race — Siphon Soul permanently saps my Str/Dex, so I must burst it down. PLAN: Wake it via attacks, exploit the stunned turn + Siphon turns as free damage windows. Use Wrath (Eruption doubles to 18) for burst but EXIT Wrath (Empty Body) before its 18-dmg Attack turns or they become 36. Strength Potion saved for a doubled Wrath burst turn. Block its 18 Attacks with Defend/Halt/Empty Body. WIN%: 14% (+2, full HP, potion, but Lagavulin is a DPS check for a starter-ish deck).

Discard Defend - free Inflame turn, want attacks not block
Scry: bin Burn++Defend, keep Empty Fist (Wrath exit), dig for Eruption+ + Strikes for a free-turn Wrath burst

events.translated: Strike → Hexaghost → Wallop → Hexaghost → Halt → End Turn
events.reasoning: At 23 HP vs Tackle 18, enemy has 12 block. Strike (enemy block 12->6) -> Wallop (9: 6 absorbed, 3 to face +3 block to me) -> Halt 3 = 6 block. Take 12 -> 11 HP. Survival over damage.
Scry keep all (Empty Body block, Eruption+ Wrath, Pressure Points 8 unblockable, Strike). At 12 HP must block Sear 10. Will use Essence of Steel (4 Plated Armor) too.
Essence of Steel: +4 Plated Armor (persistent block). At 12 HP, need block for Sear 10 + Burn+ 4 self-damage.

events.command: play Empty Body; play Pressure Points 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Empty Body → Pressure Points → Hexaghost → Strike → Hexaghost → End Turn
events.reasoning: Survival: Empty Body 8 + Plated Armor 4 = 12 block. Burn+ 4 self-dmg -> 8 left, Sear 10 -> take 2 (->10 HP). Chip Pressure Points 8 + Strike 6 = 14 (50->36). NO Wrath (would double Sear to 20 = death).
Discard Burn+
Discard Halt - need ATTACKS to kill 20 HP this turn (Inferno 36 would kill me)
Scry: dig for attacks (Wallop/Empty Fist/Crush Joints/Strikes). MUST kill Hexaghost at 20 HP or die to Inferno 36.

CRISIS: Hexaghost at 20 HP intends Inferno 36, I'm at 10 HP. Hand has only 2 Strikes (12 dmg) — 8 short of lethal, and 36 is unblockable at 10 HP. I bled too slowly: kept HP-conserving instead of pushing a Wrath kill 2-3 turns ago when Eruption+ was available, letting the fight reach turn 16 / 6th-Burn clog and a fatal Inferno. Playing max block + chip as a hail mary. WIN%: 4% (-14, near-certain death to Inferno).
